riskClass: auth or identity; permission, secret, or trust-boundary logic
workDescription: ADM-013 (issue #149) — PRE-EXECUTE design-level pack. Part A: super_admin-only visibility/control over pending staff invites created by ADM-011 — GET /api/admin/staff/invites (pending-only list), POST /api/admin/staff/invites/:id/revoke (kills an invite's accept link by setting a new revoked_at column), POST /api/admin/staff/invites/:id/resend (rotates the token hash on the same row, retiring the old link). This adds a new revoked_at liveness invariant that must be enforced at every 'is this invite still live' check site: /staff-invite/start's guard, /staff-invite/consume's atomic claim WHERE, and staff.ts's create-time supersede predicate. Part B: staff removal/demotion — reuses the EXISTING POST /api/admin/users/:id/role route unmodified (role: 'customer') to demote an active staff member; zero new server code, a pure apps/admin UI addition (confirm-gated 'Remove from staff' button wired to the already-existing useChangeStaffRole() mutation). Both parts are super_admin-only and REVOKE/DEMOTE existing access — neither introduces a new privilege-GRANT path (invite CREATE, from ADM-011, is unmodified by this plan).
approver: vc-validate-agent (automated Layer 1/Layer 2 fan-out, VALIDATE re-run 22-07-26, recorded Gate: CONDITIONAL in the plan's ## Validate Contract) — this evidence pack is a separate, subsequent PRE-EXECUTE artifact generated at the orchestrator's explicit request, grounded in direct reads of the CURRENT (post-ADM-011/ADM-012) source tree, not a re-run of VALIDATE itself.
note: review-decision.json is deliberately NOT created by this pass. The plan's own Validate Contract records 'Accepted by: PENDING' for the high-risk-evidence-pack determination — this pack exists so a human (the project owner) can make that APPROVE/REJECT call with concrete evidence in hand, mirroring how ADM-011's pack was generated at VALIDATE time and left review-decision.json for a separate human step. The code for ADM-013 is NOT built yet; this pack analyzes the DESIGN (the locked plan + the real, current code it will modify or reuse), not an implementation.
